entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the crop studied for male sterility

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC-NUCLEAR MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where male fertility is absent due to interaction between cytoplasm and nucleus

entities.name: GENETIC BACKGROUND
entities.description: The overall genetic makeup of a line which influences the expression of CMS

entities.name: NEAR-ISONUCLEAR LINES
entities.description: Lines with similar nuclear genetic backgrounds used for reliable characterization of CMS sources

entities.name: CMS SOURCES
entities.description: Genetic sources of cytoplasmic-nuclear male sterility, including A1, A2, A3, Av, and A4

entities.name: A1
entities.description: A specific source of cytoplasmic-nuclear male sterility

entities.name: A2
entities.description: A specific source of cytoplasmic-nuclear male sterility

entities.name: A3
entities.description: A specific source of cytoplasmic-nuclear male sterility

entities.name: AV
entities.description: A specific source of cytoplasmic-nuclear male sterility

entities.name: A4
entities.description: A specific source of cytoplasmic-nuclear male sterility

entities.name: MALE FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: The process or trait of regaining male fertility in CMS hybrids

entities.name: TOPCROSS HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids produced by crossing a specific line with diverse populations to evaluate restorers and maintainers

entities.name: RESTORERS
entities.description: Genetic sources that restore male fertility in hybrids

entities.name: MAINTAINERS
entities.description: Genetic sources that maintain male sterility in hybrids
